metadata.title: Hyundai Warranty Coverage Guide
notes: This file is intended to hold normalized coverage rules from the Hyundai Warranty Coverage Guide.
Each coverage item should eventually be tied to time, mileage, ownership, exclusions, and source references.

coverage_categories.label: New Vehicle Limited Warranty
coverage_categories.description: General new vehicle warranty coverage category.

coverage_categories.label: Powertrain Limited Warranty
coverage_categories.description: Powertrain coverage including ownership-sensitive rules where applicable.

coverage_categories.label: Federal Emissions Warranty
coverage_categories.description: Federal emissions defect and performance warranty coverage.

coverage_categories.label: Adjustment Coverage
coverage_categories.description: Adjustment-type coverage where Hyundai allows short-term correction coverage.

coverage_categories.label: 12V Battery Coverage
coverage_categories.description: Coverage rules for the conventional 12V battery.

coverage_categories.label: Audio / Navigation / Radio
coverage_categories.description: Coverage for infotainment, radio, navigation, and sound-related components.

coverage_categories.label: Paint Coverage
coverage_categories.description: Paint defect or paint-related warranty coverage.

coverage_categories.label: Parts and Accessories
coverage_categories.description: Coverage for Hyundai supplied service parts and accessories.

coverage_categories.label: Hybrid / EV System Coverage
coverage_categories.description: Coverage for hybrid, EV, and high-voltage related systems where applicable.
